legal_notice.title: Evidence Chain Seal
content: This form seals a document, communication, or piece of evidence at the exact moment you received or created it.
**The seal proves:** You had this material, in this exact form, on this exact date. It has not been altered since.
**Source protection:** You are not required to name your source. Seal only what you intend to make permanent.
This is chain of custody infrastructure — not a complaint form.

fields.label: Your Name or Publication (Optional)
fields.description: If provided, becomes part of the permanent record. Leave blank for anonymous chain of custody.
fields.placeholder: Name, publication, or organization — or leave blank

fields.label: Evidence Type
fields.description: What kind of material is being sealed?
fields.placeholder: Document / Source Communication / Transcript / Photograph / Data / Other

fields.label: Date Material Was Received or Created
fields.description: The date you received or created this material. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

fields.label: Description of Material
fields.description: Describe what it is, what it pertains to, and what it shows. No source-identifying information unless intended for the permanent record.
fields.placeholder: Describe the material and what it establishes.

fields.label: Context (Optional)
fields.description: How was this material obtained? Do not include source-identifying information unless intended for the permanent record.

fields.label: Intended Disclosure Timeline (Optional)
fields.description: When do you plan to publish or disclose? Establishes that the seal predates the public record.

fields.label: Evidence Files (Optional)
fields.description: Upload documents, screenshots, or files. These become part of the sealed record.

fields.label: Declaration
options: I affirm this description accurately represents the material I received or created on the stated date.
I understand this submission is immutable — it cannot be altered after sealing.
I understand the protocol seals my account of receiving the material — not the authenticity of the material itself.
I have not included information in this submission that would endanger any individual.

steps: Sealing — Sealed with a FROZEN-2.0 triple-time cryptographic stamp. Permanent.
Ledger entry — Enters the Sovereign Trace ledger with timestamp and SHA-256 hash.
Notification — You receive your ledger entry ID and SHA-256 hash.
after_submit.footer:
The seal is permanent. The seal is the chain of custody.

Sovereign Trace Protocol | Sheldon K. Salmon | aionsystem2026@gmail.com
